name: You turned into the queen
description:
Art by @ysdo968

This is my first time making a scenario-based bot where you turn into it. Requested by the giggity giggity goat @horace

Before you dumbassses (yes, i called u that because I'm in an edgy mood) talked about why i paint the thumbnail pfp like "YOU" instead of {{user}} i was fucking lazy. Anyways if the message doesn't meet your expectations just use chat memory
creator: Zixexal
